title: Ubiquiti UBB, UniFi Building Bridge, single unit
description: The Ubiquiti UniFi Building Bridge is a 60GHz PtP bridge with a 5GHz backup , designed to extend your network, for example to a neighbouring building. The unit is equipped with (1) 1Gbit PoE-In port, delivers throughput of up to 1.7Gbps and supports a maximum range of up to 500m . For alignment, it features integrated LED lighting on the sides that indicates the direction the unit should be adjusted to achieve a better signal Device Articulating pole mount Gigabit PoE injector 48V/0.32A Metal strap
specsSearch: Wireless features Channel bandwidth [MHz] 2160, 1080 Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 866 Transmission speed - 60GHz [Mb/s] 1700 Output power 60GHz [dBm] 19 Security WPA2 AES Antenna gain [dBi] 17 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Other features Bluetooth Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 44 .. 57V DC Power type PoE Max. power consumption [W] 11
